description.ko: 엄격한 기하학적 질서가 파편들의 아름답고 계산된 혼돈으로 붕괴하는 디지털 엔트로피를 탐구합니다.
description.en: A study in digital entropy, where rigid geometric order collapses into a beautiful, calculated chaos of fragments.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Monolith’s Glitch.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian pillar frozen in a state of hyper-geometric disintegration, shattering into a calculated vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. The scene is set against a clinical #FFFFFF void, intersected by heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution.
